hooks.command: set -a; [ -f .env.local ] && . .env.local; set +a; if [ -n "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then printf '%s' '{"text":"✅ Claude Code 작업이 완료되었습니다."}' > /tmp/claude_slack_payload.json; curl -s -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data-binary @/tmp/claude_slack_payload.json "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" > /dev/null 2>&1; rm -f /tmp/claude_slack_payload.json; fi; true
